mapper.insert: insert into booking_resource (name, type, capacity, location, status) values (#{name}, #{type}, #{capacity}, #{location}, #{status})

insert into booking_config (resource_id, start_time, end_time, slot_duration, max_booking_per_slot, advance_days, cancel_limit_minutes) values (#{resourceId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{maxBookingPerSlot}, #{advanceDays}, #{cancelLimitMinutes})
mapper.update:
update booking_resource
name = #{name},
type = #{type},
capacity = #{capacity},
location = #{location},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}

update booking_config
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
slot_duration = #{slotDuration},
max_booking_per_slot = #{maxBookingPerSlot},
advance_days = #{advanceDays},
cancel_limit_minutes = #{cancelLimitMinutes},
where resource_id = #{resourceId}
update booking_resource set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{resourceId}
